chain.title: Blockchain
chain.description: Which blockchain to write the attestation to

data.title: Data to Attest
data.description: The data to create an attestation for. Can be any JSON structure. Will be hashed (not stored on-chain in full).

actor_id.title: Actor ID
actor_id.description: The Apify Actor that produced this data

source_url.title: Source URL
source_url.description: The URL this data was scraped from

verification_url.title: Generate Verification URL
verification_url.description: Include a verification URL in the output

store_full_data.title: Store Full Data in Apify
store_full_data.description: Store the full data in Apify Key-Value store (in addition to on-chain hash)

verify.title: Verification Mode
verify.description: Set to true to verify an existing attestation instead of creating a new one

tx_hash.title: Transaction Hash (for verification)
tx_hash.description: The blockchain transaction hash to verify (only used when verify=true)
